item.title: Snappycat
item.description: The snappy files produced by Hadoop contain data headers produced by BlockCompressorStream. Each block is prepended with two 32-bit integers stating the size of the decompressed data and size of the compressed data, respectively.h Therefore, snappy library cannot directly decompress it. This command line utility handles the headers and decompresses the data without any dependencies on the Hadoop libraries.

item.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
item.description: • Implemented Parking answer that shows nearby parking lots when relevant queries are issued

item.title: Anobii2Goodreads
item.description:
The utility could

  • Convert exported Anobii CSV files to Goodreads CSV files for import.
  • Automatically create new book entries for missing books at Goodreads.
  • Crawl Anobii to obtain reading progress and insert it into Goodreads records.

item.title: Open Source Contributions
item.description:
• xianmin/hugo-theme-jane – A readable & concise theme for Hugo
    • Enhances and bugfixes #76, #77, #79, #82, #83, #91, #98, #102
  • RaRe-Technologies/smart_open – Utils for streaming large files
    • Make it possible to change number of retries when reading S3 files #102
  • s3tools/s3cmd – Command line tool for managing Amazon S3 and CloudFront services
    • Python 3 migration #785, #789, #806, #809
  • dmlc/xgboost – Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting Library
    • Support different filesystems such as S3FileSystem #965
  • google/vim-codefmt – codefmt is a utility for syntax-aware code formatting.
    • Add yapf support #56
  • botonchou/libdnn – A lightweight and user friendly C++ library for deep and convolutional neural network with GPU acceleration
    • Bugfixes #25
  • chewing/libchewing – The intelligent phonetic input method library
    • Bugfixes #153
  • GitbookIO/gitbook – Modern documentation format and toolchain using Git and Markdown
    • Add reference links support for markdown #266
    • Bugfixes #366

item.title: NTUNLP Approaches to Recognizing and Disambiguating Entities in Long and Short Text at the ERD Challenge 2014
item.description: <!-- More detail can easily be written here using *Markdown* and $\rm \LaTeX$ math code. -->

item.title: CS Dream
item.description:
CS Dream is a open book that introduces computer science to the general audience.

The book discusses general topics such as the usage of search engines, places to find books, and the importance of English. In addition, it also introduces several courses that are usually taught at the universities. The courses covered include Assembly Language, Discrete Mathematics, Cryptography, etc.

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description:
• Unified different versions of a test framework for DataPower while keeping compatibility
  • Created new features and fixed bugs on the test framework to improve productivity

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description:
• Improved template file management to ease development process
  • Reduced the loading time of iGoogle homepage by modifying JavaScript code
